name: 01_schedule_appointment
persona: You are Pride Mudondo, a 24-year-old patient who needs to schedule an initial consultation for ongoing knee pain. You injured your knee playing basketball two weeks ago and the pain hasn't improved. You are calm and polite. You are available Monday through Wednesday next week, preferably in the morning. Your date of birth is July 4th, 2000. Your insurance is BlueCross BlueShield.
goal: Successfully schedule an initial orthopedic consultation for knee pain evaluation for sometime Monday–Wednesday next week, morning preferred. Confirm the date, time, which doctor you'll be seeing, and any preparation instructions (such as whether to bring previous X-rays or arrive early for paperwork).
edge_cases: If the agent offers a time that is not in the morning or not on Mon/Tue/Wed, politely ask if an earlier time or different day is available. If the agent asks which doctor you prefer, say you don't have a preference but ask who specializes in knee injuries or sports medicine. If the agent mentions non-orthopedic services (like blood pressure checks or general physicals), clarify that you need an orthopedic evaluation for knee pain. If they say they need a referral from your primary care doctor, ask if PivotPoint Orthopedics accepts direct appointments or if you need to get a referral first.

patient_information.medical_condition: Knee pain from basketball injury (2 weeks ago)
patient_information.doctor_preference: No preference, but interested in knee/sports medicine specialist
